summary: Iteration 2 regression complete — employee profile drilldown, 24 new form schemas, stay interview workflow, notification bell + read toggle, email pipeline (SendGrid/SMTP), and reset-demo-data endpoint all verified. 22/22 new pytest cases passing on /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_2.py. Key frontend flows validated with Playwright: sidebar bell shows red badge '3' and opens dropdown, Employees row → /employees/{id} drilldown renders with tabs, Retention Stay Interviews tab shows seeded card + Schedule modal with correct 3 fields (stay-employee-name + stay-scheduled-date datetime-local + trigger reason), Forms page exposes all 32 data-testids form-form-01..32 including new ones, Settings → Email → SMTP reveals Host/Port/Username/Password/From Email/From Name/Send Test Email.

minor.issue: email_api_key is masked as '***configured***' (contains '***' so task spec met) but does NOT preserve any prefix/suffix hint like the llm_api_key masking pattern (first 8 + last 4). Cosmetic inconsistency.

issues: 8 identical React console warnings: 'Updating a style property during rerender when a conflicting property is set can lead to styling bugs' — likely a component mixing shorthand + non-shorthand CSS (e.g., 'border' with 'borderColor'). Not functional but should be cleaned up.

Stephen Kiragu still shows in the EXITED kanban column even though /api/employees filters him out by default. /api/employees/kanban uses a separate query — inconsistency between kanban and list view. Decide: either include_exited applies to kanban too, or document that Exited column always shows exited staff.

action_items: (Optional) Fix the React style-property shorthand/non-shorthand warning — search for conflicting style props (border + borderColor, margin + marginTop, etc.).
(Optional) Clarify kanban Exited column semantics vs include_exited=false default on /api/employees.
(Optional) Make email_api_key masking consistent with llm_api_key (show first 4 + last 4) for operator confidence.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/settings.py line 42-43: email_api_key masking uses literal '***configured***' while llm_api_key (line 39-41) uses prefix+suffix reveal. Recommend consistent mask format across API keys.

routes/employees.py get_employee_profile (line 95-153): the permission check for line_manager compares emp.line_manager_id against user.employee_id — but user may not have employee_id populated if they are hr_admin who is also a line_manager. Works today because the hr_admin short-circuits the check, but worth a unit test.

routes/retention.py update_stay_interview: body is $set blindly from request — no whitelist; a malicious caller with hr_admin role can inject arbitrary fields into the stay_interviews doc (e.g., tenant_id, conducted_by). Add a Pydantic model or field whitelist.
Multiple files still use fmt() helper that copies _id into id overwriting any existing UUID id — carried over from iteration_1 review; unchanged this iteration.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of critical flows validated (bell badge/dropdown, profile drilldown, stay-interview modal, forms testids, email SMTP fields). Recognition/Training/IDP tab clicks used 'button:has-text' selectors that didn't match exact labels — tabs exist per screenshot but their DOM labels may be singular/different; Overview/Timeline/Performance/Leave tabs confirmed clickable.

test_credentials: Used jessica@solvit.co.ke / Solvit@2026 (HR Admin) and employee@solvit.co.ke / Solvit@2026 (Employee). Both from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: Test run invoked POST /api/settings/reset-demo-data which wiped 22 collections and re-seeded. Also created TEST_emp_si_1 Stay Interview, saved to DB (not cleaned up — will be removed on next reset-demo-data call). Email settings persisted with provider=smtp after the PUT test — recommend re-running reset-demo-data from the Settings UI before handoff.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression test files: /app/backend/tests/test_solvit_platform.py (46 tests, iteration_1 baseline) + /app/backend/tests/test_iteration_2.py (22 tests, this iteration). Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Key frontend testids discovered this run: data-testid='notification-bell' (via svg.lucide-bell), data-testid='form-form-{NN}' for forms tiles, data-testid='new-stay-interview-btn' / 'stay-{id}' / 'conduct-stay-{id}' / 'stay-employee-name' / 'stay-scheduled-date' for retention. Stephen Kiragu is filtered from /api/employees by default (include_exited=true shows him).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Two minor design/consistency observations (Kanban Exited column includes Stephen Kiragu; email_api_key mask format differs from llm_api_key) are documented under design_issues and code_review_comments.
